full_text:
Pei Kai (Shuze)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Kai, styledShuze, was born in Wenxi in Hedong. Handsome, charming and charitable, he was a much admired minister. Pei Kai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Pei Kai lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
